response.justification: Strong technical foundation and engineering discipline with 16+ years of experience significantly exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Demonstrates clear alignment with primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and current work directly involves AI-agent infrastructure. Gaps in specific frameworks (Nest.js, Vitest) and databases (PostgreSQL) appear learnable given the breadth of technical background and proven ability to master diverse technology stacks. Software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, scalability optimization) align well with role requirements.
strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with 16+ years and multiple Senior/Staff roles demonstrating sustained career progression at senior level
Strong alignment with core technologies: TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, MongoDB, Docker, and current role directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks

Proven ability to deliver high-impact products at scale (top 10 apps, micro-services handling millions of requests/second) with demonstrated software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Primary stack frameworks not explicitly mentioned: Nest.js and Vitest are not listed; while Node.js and testing expertise are strong, specific framework experience is unclear
Database platform gaps: PostgreSQL not mentioned; experience limited to MongoDB and MySQL, potentially requiring onboarding on the company's specific database choice
Security and authentication practices not explicitly highlighted despite strong engineering foundation; authorization, compliance, and security-specific experience unclear from resume

key_factors.factor: AI-agent work and current role alignment
